title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 238.345 - Commission may provide assistance, how
text:
238.345.  Commission may provide assistance, how. — The commission may contract with a corporation to provide it assistance in project funding, promotion, planning, design, right-of-way acquisition, relocation assistance services, construction, maintenance, and operation.  The commission may charge the corporation a reasonable fee, not exceeding the actual cost of providing the service.
(L. 1990 S.B. 479 & 649 § 28) 
Effective 5-30-90
